holdings.infoBox: JHMM is an equity ETF with a total of 666 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 0.78%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 0.66%, Coherent at 0.63%, Comfort Systems USA at 0.62%, and Keysight Technologies at 0.58%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Multifactor Mid Cap ETF (JHMM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the John Hancock Dimensional Mid Cap index. The fund tracks an index of US firms ranked 200-950 by size, weighted by multiple factors relative to their sector peers. JHMM was launched on Sep 28, 2015 and is issued by John Hancock.
infoTable: John Hancock Dimensional Mid Cap Index
